name: dev.ucp.common.loyalty
title: Loyalty Extension
description: Extends various Capabilities with loyalty support using memberships info.

earning_breakdown.description: Breakdown rule of the reward earnings

description.description: A display-ready, human-readable rationale for the specific rewards (e.g. 2x on footwear).

benefit_id.description: Optional `id` of the membership_tier_benefit that produced this rewards rule. Resolves against `membership_tier_benefit.id` within the same parent loyalty membership.

earning_forecast.description: Preview of rewards to be earned from the current transaction.

amount.description: Total rewards to be earned if the transaction completes.

breakdown.description: List of breakdown of earning contributing to the total.

reward_currency.description: The currency of the loyalty reward.

decimal_places.description: The position of a digit to the right of a decimal point. Applies to all amount related fields for rewards.

membership_reward.description: Quantifiable and collectable reward of loyalty membership of the customer.

currency.description: A unit of value that customers can accumulate through various commercial activities.

earning_forecast.description: Preview of rewards to be earned from the current transaction.

membership_tier_benefit.description: Benefits associated with a membership tier.

id.description: Unique identifier for the tier benefit.

description.description: Detailed complete explanation of the informational benefit (e.g. “Early access to sales”).

membership_tier.description: Specific achievement rank or status milestone that unlocks escalating value as a member progresses through activity or spend.

id.description: Unique identifier for the membership tier.

name.description: The human-readable name of the tier (e.g., “Platinum”).

benefits.description: List of possible benefits associated with this tier.

membership_track.description: An enrollment pathway or program category that a user can join independently or simultaneously.

id.description: Unique identifier for the membership track.

name.description: The human-readable name of the track (e.g., “Platinum”).

tiers.description: List of tiers associated with the membership track.

reward_currencies.description: List of reward currencies associated with the membership track.

loyalty_membership.description: Loyalty membership the business has accepted for the eligibility claim represented by the parent map key. Programs that can be joined independently MUST be modeled as separate sibling entries under the loyalty map, distinguished by reverse-domain naming (e.g., 'com.target.circle' and 'com.target.circle.card').

name.description: Business specific name of the loyalty membership/program.

display_id.description: A masked or partial version of the membership id for user recognition (e.g., '****5678').

tiers.description: Active tier(s) the buyer holds within this membership. Most programs are single-status (one entry); programs with parallel status dimensions (e.g., current and lifetime) populate one entry per active tier. Omitted when no tier has been resolved (typically when provisional is true).

rewards.description: List of quantifiable rewards the buyer holds within this membership. Each object encapsulates one type of reward.

provisional.description: True if this membership requires additional verification.

loyalty.description: Key-value pair with key represents buyer/platform asserted eligibility claims and value represents associated membership information. All loyalty keys MUST use reverse-domain naming to ensure provenance and prevent collisions when multiple extensions contribute to the shared namespace.

propertyNames.description: Reverse-domain identifier that represents eligibility claim accepted by the Business for this membership. Corresponds to a value from context.eligibility.

additionalProperties.description: Payload that describes the membership information corresponds to the claim.
